name: Gold benchmark — seed (2026-06-04)
description: FROZEN gold set (seed). Canonical keys only (ExpectedSql / ExpectedScalar / ExpectedRowCount / ExpectedColumns / ExpectedInvalid + Category + Difficulty). Every scalar/row value was verified by execution against AISupportAnalysisDB on 2026-06-04 (GoldVerified=true). This is the format + a starter set; the full ~150-250-case gold across all 8 shapes incl. the 246 abstained + 68 false-OOS classes is authored on top of this. Refusals use ExpectedInvalid (NOT the broken 'Refusal' intent). False-OOS cases use ExpectedInvalid=false so an over-refusal is a clear FAIL.

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets do we have
how many customers do we have
list the names of all governorates
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT NameEn FROM Regions WHERE ParentRegionId IS NULL

Scenarios.Question: show the currently active tariffs
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT * FROM Tariffs WHERE EffectiveTo IS NULL
